description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 lower/earlier thresholds.

Split the current late trigger into separately configurable thresholds for staged observation work, published observation updates, and reflection/consolidation so OM can start working earlier without overcommitting to one policy.
title: Add separate configurable thresholds for staging, publishing, and reflection
